changes: New: Docupedia Publisher - publish AI-generated content directly to Confluence pages. [Locked for Testing]
Fix: Resolved connectivity issues for some AI services.
Improved: Micro-interactions added across all 7 apps — animated entrances for upload areas, file items, chat messages, stat counters, findings, suggestion cards, review sections, and more.
Fix: Security Upgraded with latest dependencies and vulnerability patches.
New: Added a 404 Error Page for invalid routes.
New: Copy as Diagram feature added in AI Diagram Generator.
New: Mouse cursor effect added in Spring mode.
New: In AI BPMN Builder Form, now you can Drag Lanes and Sublanes.
Fix: Diagram Generator Capabilities Updated.
AI Diagram Generator now includes a visual diagram guide with previews to help users choose the right diagram type faster.
Added clear step-by-step guides in PowerPoint Creator, AI Diagram Generator, and Audit Checker for easier first-time use.
PowerPoint Creator and AI Diagram Generator now support PDF, PNG, JPG, and JPEG uploads.
PowerPoint Creator App now includes 4 new SmartArt layouts, Improved the Presentation output, added a orange theme button.
Added Spring Mode Button in navigation for a fresh seasonal theme. (Testing Feature)
Updated the Logo, Colors, Font according to the BSH Design Guidelines across the application.
Added a filter option in search to easily find AI Apps by categories.
Lots of Fixes and Improvements across different apps for better performance and user experience.
Added Better loading Animations.
Mobile User Experience significantly improved with optimized responsive CSS across all tools.
Added a new "Upload & Analyze" feature in the Signavio BPMN Builder, complementing the existing Form Builder mode.
Launched AI Diagram Generator to analyze uploaded PDFs and generate downloadable draw.io diagram types with refined result cards.
Learn Signavio app linked - Interactive learning website with games to master BPMN modeling.
Functional Spec content and structure updated for better document quality.
Enhanced JSON export/import support for saving and resuming document work.
Document Builder now supports both Functional Spec and Business Requirement document creation.
Mode selector added to switch between Functional Spec and BR document types.
You can now export and import BR documents in JSON format to resume work.
Home Page UI updated for better user experience.
Document Creator launched for Functional Spec document generation. [NON-AI]
PowerPoint Creator added to Create Quick Powerpoints using PDFS to BSH Powerpoint Template.
Beta Version Launch!
Dark Mode support added across the entire application.
Search functionality implemented for AI Apps on the Home page.
Changelog and Notification system updated.
Added new hosting environment on SAP BTP Cloud Foundry.
Implemented user authentication.
Fixed bugs in Apps.
Workflows updated for better performance.
BPMN Diagram Checker launched with Problem/Solution findings and PDF+image support.
Results panel simplified to show direct actionable guidance.
Audit Checker fully functional with PDF validation.
Signavio BPMN Generator ready for end-to-end BPMN export.
Initial UIs for Audit Check and Signavio BPMN Generator shipped (non-functional beta).
